title: Egenolfia gaudichaudiana
taxonomy: Egenolfia gaudichaudiana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It belongs to the genus Egenolfia, which is a group of plants native to the Pacific Islands. Egenolfia gaudichaudiana specifically is a plant native to French Polynesia. Further classification includes it being in the order Apiales and the class Magnoliopsida. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as a member of the Apiaceae family.
